caption: A news broadcast features a segment with the Hindi headline "2024 में JDU के साथ 'खेला' होगा?" and the "NEWS 18 इंडिया" logo. The screen includes a sidebar with portraits and names, including "डि़ि़ी CM", "सुब्रत चौधरी", "विजय सिन्हा", "मंत्री", and "डॉ. प्रेम कुमार". The footage shows a group of men in a brightly lit indoor setting. A man in a khaki police uniform stands centrally in the first frame, flanked by other men in formal and casual attire. As the sequence progresses, the camera movement or the motion of people creates a blurring effect. A man in a dark shirt moves across the foreground, obscuring the view of the police officer and other individuals. By the final frame, the man in the dark shirt is partially visible on the right side of the screen, while other men stand in the background. A red banner at the bottom contains the text "JDU को" and a timestamp of "10:03 PM" next to the word "MAHASHODH".
